title: Brotein Xcode asset catalog — body-part icons + brand colors
html:
Xcode asset-catalog browser for Brotein — AccentColor, AppIcon, appstore1024, body-part icons (arms / back / chest / core / legs / shoulders), brand colors (brandPrimary / brandSecondary / destructiveAction), text/background semantic tokens (primary/secondary/tertiary).

brotein · xcode · swiftui
